name: briefing room
hints: This is where your mission begins. Examine the tape recorder for your briefing.
PLAY TAPE or LISTEN to the tape recorder to learn your mission objectives.
GET TAPE - you may need it later. The tape recorder contains your mission briefing. Go WEST to enter the base.
notes: Starting room for Secret Mission. The tape recorder contains mission briefing information. GET TAPE before proceeding. WEST enters the main grey corridor of the enemy base.
